allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "name: $\(git config --global user.name\)"; Write-Output "email: $\(git config --global user.email\)")

PowerShell($conns = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conns\) { $conns.OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "Killed lingering PID $_" } catch {} } } else { Write-Output "Port 3000 clear — no lingering dev server." })

PowerShell(Set-Location "D:\\Personal Websites"; try { Rename-Item -Path "Roblox Top" -NewName "rodict" -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Output "RENAMED OK" } catch { Write-Output "RENAME FAILED: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; Test-Path "D:\\Personal Websites\\rodict"; Test-Path "D:\\Personal Websites\\Roblox Top")
